ports.name: Motor Input (Phase Wires)
ports.note: Three hardwired phase leads (red, black, white), 12AWG. Gauge confirmed by SPARK MAX documentation; verify against NEO V1.1 spec sheet.

ports.name: Hall-Effect Encoder Output
ports.note: Integrated hall-effect encoder. Port type 'sensor' used per design decision in phase-1-handoff.md — this type may need to be added to the schema's port type enum. Connects to SPARK MAX encoder port.
